source_pr.title: domain: Introduce runaway manager
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: Ref #43691 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Introduce runaway manager to check query execution time and perform actions

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [x] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Introduce runaway query control based on resource group
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: avoid data race.

evidence: files: DEPS.bzl, Makefile.common, build/nogo_config.json, ddl/resourcegroup/group.go, ddl/resourcegrouptest/BUILD.bazel, ddl/resourcegrouptest/resource_group_test.go, distsql/request_builder.go, domain/BUILD.bazel, domain/domain.go, domain/infosync/BUILD.bazel, domain/infosync/info.go, domain/infosync/resource_group_manager.go, domain/infosync/resource_manager_client.go, domain/resourcegroup/BUILD.bazel, domain/resourcegroup/runaway.go, errno/errcode.go, errno/errname.go, errors.toml, executor/BUILD.bazel, executor/adapter.go, executor/calibrate_resource.go, executor/calibrate_resource_test.go, executor/executor.go, go.mod, go.sum, kv/BUILD.bazel, kv/kv.go, privilege/privileges/privileges.go, session/session.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/BUILD.bazel, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx.go, sessionctx/variable/BUILD.bazel, sessionctx/variable/session.go, store/copr/BUILD.bazel, store/copr/coprocessor.go, store/driver/BUILD.bazel, store/driver/error/error.go, store/driver/tikv_driver.go, store/mockstore/unistore/BUILD.bazel, store/mockstore/unistore/pd.go, tidb-server/main.go, util/dbterror/exeerrors/errors.go, util/runaway.go
